data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes choice overload by categorizing and limiting options offered to the user.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of concise navigation menus and personalized recommendations.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design prioritizes easily accessible navigational buttons and controls within the interface.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and spacing are optimized for quick reach and interaction.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Spotify balances aesthetic appeal with functionality to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Use of an engaging design system with consistent color palettes and typography.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Spotify aims to mirror user interface standards users are already familiar with.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive gestures and navigation patterns akin to other popular applications.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups similar content and controls close together to improve user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Effective use of grid layouts and spacing within playlists and album views.
